features.funGamesDesc: Addition, subtraction, and multiplication in an interactive game format
features.progressDesc: See your results and improve with every game
features.customDesc: Adjust difficulty based on the child's age and level

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.description: MathFun makes learning math fun and effective
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select between addition, subtraction, or multiplication
howItWorks.step2Desc: Solve math problems in a fun way
howItWorks.step3Desc: Review your results and improve with each session

hero.title: Learn math while playing with <pink>MathFun</pink>!
hero.description: Fun games for kids aged 6 to 11 that help improve math skills

Game.title: Choose a game
Game.description: Select one of our math games designed to help you learn while having fun.
Game.additionDesc: Practice addition with numbers from 1 to 20
Game.subtractionDesc: Practice subtraction with numbers from 1 to 20
Game.additionInstructions: Solve as many additions as you can in 30 seconds.

Testimonials.title: Kids love MathFun!
Testimonials.description: Find out why parents and teachers recommend our app.

1.text: My daughter loves practicing math with MathFun. The colors and animations keep her engaged and wanting to play more!
1.name: Jane Smith

2.text: As a teacher, I recommend MathFun to all my students. It's a fun way to reinforce what they learn in the classroom.
2.name: Charles Miller

3.text: My son used to struggle with multiplication, but since using MathFun, he has improved tremendously. And he has fun!
3.name: Laura Jones
